mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations (user_id, court_id, reserve_date, start_time, end_time, status, verification_code, verified_at, verified_by, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courtId}, #{reserveDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{verificationCode}, #{verifiedAt}, #{verifiedBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, c.name AS courtName, u.avatar AS userAvatar, u.gender AS userGender, u.nickname AS userNickname, u.age AS userAge FROM reservations r JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.reserve_date = #{date} AND r.start_time = #{startTime} AND r.status NOT IN ('cancelled') ORDER BY r.court_id, r.id

SELECT r.*, c.name AS courtName, u.avatar AS userAvatar, u.gender AS userGender, u.nickname AS userNickname FROM reservations r JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.reserve_date DESC, r.start_time DESC, r.id DESC
SELECT r.*, c.name AS courtName, u.nickname AS userNickname, u.phone AS userPhone FROM reservations r JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM reservations WHERE verification_code = #{code} AND status != 'cancelled' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM reservations WHERE status = 'unverified' AND reserve_date IS NOT NULL AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND CONCAT(reserve_date, ' ', LPAD(start_time, 2, '0'), ':00:00') < #{cutoff}
